query: INSERT INTO workspace (workspace_id, name, display_name, verified_domain, verified_domain_status, deployment_mode, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, NULL, $4, $5, 'seed') ON CONFLICT (workspace_id) DO UPDATE SET display_name = excluded.display_name, verified_domain_status = excluded.verified_domain_status, deployment_mode = excluded.deployment_mode
